---
layout: default
title: "Rajya Sabha Dynamics and Parliamentary Monsoon Session Preparations"
date: 2026-07-14T05:43:31.041501+00:00
summary: "The NDA nears Rajya Sabha majority as the Monsoon Session approaches, amid internal NCP leadership disputes and ongoing debates over parliamentary authority"
run_time_ist: "11:13AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:13AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha Majority:</strong> The NDA is within six seats of securing a majority in the Rajya Sabha, a threshold that could significantly influence the passage of pending legislation during the upcoming Monsoon Session.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPbVc1WXBOUkVwQXdoV3JOazZ4QXNiSk0xTDNqT3FSRWZ5R3RrMUhoVWZLX240bDBMSnQ3M1d3S2drNFVJdWdaRzdqcmlWQjQ5R1BKZE1MbG90NmNFRnMtSWg4eG9BNURKVzZmZkRlMjk4YjJRN01odzFOZ3VaMk1RZVN3VnNWYzlVdGlBaDJkN1FtcENOUmpxZi02bmdZLXBJY0E?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Opposition Strategy:</strong> As the Monsoon Session nears, the opposition faces challenges in mounting an effective challenge against the BJP, while the government has signaled a willingness to discuss the situation in Manipur.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxQeGNzcnp5TlFQVFpURU5uY3Q2VnpmYms5Yk1vRkV3VUxYX1BYOXppX0NrWlpzUmc0UFFwQy1KbHJQekpJTEtOWXFSdWVjVEwtbEhnOEl1V2p2TUdNdlR5b2tjR05vTVFrNENfblpNZXlzb2pPRkNXdFpsa2JfTVllaHlqMnFYUzI2b00zVHltLWRhYng1TnRtTzZFaW5Pd1BJ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxNaXQ0NWE3cUkyVGUzUWhpS1F5Y2taVmFrU21ZYk1naWVVMjNDMklwMllaVUtXZmRfWTB3VWRnZVZiRnVIUnN1cHhEVjdaQndrNVk4VVJGNndObGFkbUJrTXh2cEIzSGs3LW0zUGpUYWVSTVJEZS1JRUg5bG15M0FzMkpIaUp6Y0RtYnRlMU1GbmotYjI2blNTWi05QnhnVzk2dG5z?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>NCP Leadership Dispute:</strong> The Nationalist Congress Party (NCP) is facing internal instability following a formal challenge to the election of Sunetra Pawar as the party’s national president.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Language Policy Compliance:</strong> The CBSE has informed the Supreme Court that nearly 47% of its affiliated schools have already implemented the national three-language policy.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxNS0M2U09tZUR2c1B6WFM0dW5ncmNSLWNFNEdIUUtXUTRrak84SG93T1hUQVVpV0c0ZF9PbkJuUWktN1AtcVZhUGZERnBXNXRmQlNSZmNrY3FnMkxtSkNCM0RRaE1kb241c0RNY1F2UE9fMVd5eTlYcnhPUi15QkdoLTlIME40ZjVJUU1CYWQ3N2N2aVFaSkE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary Authority:</strong> Recent discourse highlights the historical trend of Parliament amending legislation to address or redefine rulings previously established by the Supreme Court.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxNS0M2U09tZUR2c1B6WFM0dW5ncmNSLWNFNEdIUUtXUTRrak84SG93T1hUQVVpV0c0ZF9PbkJuUWktN1AtcVZhUGZERnBXNXRmQlNSZmNrY3FnMkxtSkNCM0RRaE1kb241c0RNY1F2UE9fMVd5eTlYcnhPUi15QkdoLTlIME40ZjVJUU1CYWQ3N2N2aVFaSkE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
</ul>
